IsPN¶

Given a function in the univariate form, returns true if PN and false otherwise

 1function IsPN(poly)
 2R<x>:=Parent(f);
 3F<w>:=BaseRing(R);
 4n:=Degree(F); p:=Characteristic(F);
 5    f:= func< x| Evaluate(poly, x)>;
 6    for i in {0..p^n-2} do
 7        a:=w^i;
 8        set_b := {};
 9        for y in FiniteField(p,n) do
10            b:=f(y+a)-f(y);
11            if b notin set_b then
12                Include(~set_b,b);
13            else
14                return false;
15            end if;
16        end for;
17    end for;
18    return true;
19end function;
